title: Handoffs
description: Agent handoff definitions, handoff history, filter utilities, and handoff prompt helpers

classes.name: Handoff
attributes: is_enabled: bool | Callable[[RunContextWrapper, AgentBase], MaybeAwaitable[bool]] = True
methods: get_transfer_message(agent: AgentBase) -> str  # returns JSON {assistant: agent.name}

type_aliases: THandoffInput = TypeVar(default=Any)  # handoff tool-call argument type

functions.name: handoff
functions.signature: handoff(agent, tool_name_override=None, tool_description_override=None, on_handoff=None, input_type=None, input_filter=None, nest_handoff_history=None, is_enabled=True) -> Handoff[TContext, Agent[TContext]]
functions.description: Factory function that builds a Handoff object. Validates on_handoff signature, creates TypeAdapter for input_type, builds async _invoke_handoff closure, ensures strict JSON schema, sets weakref to agent.

functions.name: nest_handoff_history
functions.description: Collapses prior transcript into a single assistant summary message wrapped in <CONVERSATION HISTORY> tags. Normalizes history, flattens nested prior summaries, converts RunItems to plain inputs, filters items, calls mapper, returns cloned HandoffInputData.

functions.name: default_handoff_history_mapper
functions.description: Produces a single assistant message summarizing the transcript using numbered lines inside <CONVERSATION HISTORY> markers.

functions.name: set_conversation_history_wrappers
functions.description: Override global start/end markers for the generated conversation summary block.

functions.name: remove_all_tools
functions.description: HandoffInputFilter that strips all tool-related items (function_call, web_search, file_search, MCP, reasoning, etc.) from input_history (tuple form) and RunItem lists.

functions.name: prompt_with_handoff_instructions
functions.description: Prepends RECOMMENDED_PROMPT_PREFIX to a prompt string. Prefix explains multi-agent system, handoffs as transfer_to_<agent_name> tool calls.

private_helpers: _should_forward_pre_item(input_item) -> bool  # False for assistant-role or summary-only types
_should_forward_new_item(input_item) -> bool  # False for tool/side-effect summary types
key_relationships: Handoff generic over [TContext, TAgent] — TAgent bound to AgentBase[Any]
Handoff holds weakref._agent_ref to target AgentBase
HandoffInputData composed of RunItems and TResponseInputItems
handoff() factory creates Handoff, sets _agent_ref weakref
nest_handoff_history uses HandoffInputData.clone() to produce filtered copy
handoff_filters module re-exports nest_handoff_history and default_handoff_history_mapper from history.py
handoffs/__init__.py imports history functions and re-exports them
inheritance: No class inheritance within this scope; Handoff is Generic[TContext, TAgent]
important_notes: Handoff is exposed to the LLM as a tool named transfer_to_<agent_name>. nest_handoff_history is opt-in beta (disabled by default). Per-handoff input_filter takes precedence over RunConfig.handoff_input_filter. Server-managed conversations disable nested history. Guardrails do not re-run across handoff boundaries within a run.
